prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document relates to the planning system under the Planning and Compulsory Purchase Act 2004 and associated regulations, which specifically apply to England. The guidance discusses local planning authorities (LPAs) and processes relevant to site identification and assessments in England.
